title: Shared execution root for split Codex skill source model
description: Non-runnable feature container for implementing the repository/source split between subagent Codex skill templates and operator-only repo-root skills, then validating and documenting the resulting behavior.
acceptance_criteria: The tree decomposes the work into small developer beads with explicit ordering across asset layout, runtime lookup, onboarding, and upgrade flows.
Testing, documentation, and review are expressed as shared follow-up beads under this container rather than as top-level siblings.
The full plan preserves `memory` and `spec-management` as operator-facing repo-root exceptions while moving subagent-only Codex skill sourcing to `templates/skills/`.
